title: DecayingWool
body:
# рҹ§¶ DecayingWool - Timed Wool Decay System

> Add dynamic gameplay to BedWars! Wool gradually disappears through 3 phases with full GUI customization.

## рҹ“– Description

**DecayingWool** is a lightweight and optimized plugin for Minecraft 1.8.8 that adds a gradual wool decay system. Perfect for **BedWars**, **Sky Wars**, and other PvP modes where dynamic building mechanics matter.

### вңЁ Why is this useful?

* рҹҺҜ **Adds strategy** вҖ” players canвҖҷt just build a bridge and forget about it
* вҡЎ **Speeds up gameplay** вҖ” fewer вҖңturtleвҖқ tactics
* рҹ”Ҙ **Increases dynamics** вҖ” constant movement and tension
* рҹҺ® **Balances the game** вҖ” defenses require continuous maintenance

---

## рҹҺҜ How it works

### 3-Phase Decay System

When a player places wool, it goes through 3 phases before disappearing:

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ Phase 1: Team color (5 sec)         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ рҹҹ§ Orange wool                       в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ Phase 2: Gray wool (5 sec)          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ в¬ң Warning: almost decayed           в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ Phase 3: Black wool (3 sec)         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ в¬ӣ Final warning                     в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ Disappearance (animation + sound)   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ рҹ’Ё Block is fully removed            в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

Total duration: 13 seconds (customizable!)
```

### рҹҺЁ Visual Effects

* **Particles** on each phase change (smoke, sparks, etc.)
* **Sounds** on color change and disappearance
* **Break animation** on final decay
* **Everything is configurable!**

---

## рҹҺ® Key Features

### вҡҷпёҸ Fully Customizable Phases

* вҸұпёҸ Set **any duration** for each phase (1вҖ“60 seconds)
* рҹҺЁ Adjust **visual effects** (particles, sounds)
* рҹҢҚ Choose **which worlds** the system works in
* рҹ”§ All via a **beautiful GUI menu** вҖ” no files required!

### рҹ–ұпёҸ Intuitive GUI Controls

**Main Menu** (`/decay`):

* рҹҹў Enable/Disable the system
* вҡҷпёҸ Edit phase durations
* рҹҢҚ World whitelist/blacklist management
* рҹҺЁ Particles & sounds configuration
* рҹ“Ҡ Real-time statistics
* рҹ’ҫ Auto-save for all settings

### вҸұпёҸ Phase Editing via GUI

**Easy time control:**

* **Left click** вҖ” +1 second
* **Right click** вҖ” -1 second
* **Shift + Left click** вҖ” +5 seconds
* **Shift + Right click** вҖ” -5 seconds
* **Middle click** вҖ” reset to default

Changes **auto-save** and apply immediately!

### рҹҢҚ World Management

**Two operation modes:**

**Whitelist:**

* Plugin works **only** in selected worlds
* Ideal for dedicated BedWars arenas

**Blacklist:**

* Plugin works **everywhere except** listed worlds
* Perfect for main peaceful worlds

**Simple toggling:**

* All server worlds displayed in one GUI
* Click to add/remove
* Mode switches in one click

### рҹ“Ҡ Real-Time Statistics

* рҹ“Ұ **Active blocks** вҖ” currently decaying wool
* вң… **Total processed** вҖ” how many blocks passed through the system
* вқҢ **Removed blocks** вҖ” total disappeared
* рҹҢҚ **Per-world** breakdown
* вҡЎ **Performance impact** вҖ” TPS load

### рҹҺЁ Effects Customization

**Particles:**

* Type selection (smoke, sparks, flame, etc.)
* Particle amount
* Enable/disable

**Sounds:**

* On phase change
* On disappearance
* Adjustable volume & pitch
* Preview in GUI

---

## рҹҺҜ Example Use Cases

### BedWars server

```yaml
Fast-paced settings:
- Phase 1: 3 seconds
- Phase 2: 3 seconds  
- Phase 3: 2 seconds
Total: 8 seconds
```

### Sky Wars arena

```yaml
Medium-paced:
- Phase 1: 5 seconds
- Phase 2: 5 seconds
- Phase 3: 3 seconds
Total: 13 seconds
```

### Slow mode

```yaml
Beginner-friendly:
- Phase 1: 10 seconds
- Phase 2: 10 seconds
- Phase 3: 5 seconds
Total: 25 seconds
```

---

## рҹҡҖ Installation

1. **Download** the plugin JAR
2. **Place** it into the `plugins/` folder
3. **Restart** the server or run `/reload`
4. **Done!** Configure via `/decay`

### Requirements

* вҳ• **Java**: 8
* рҹҺ® **Minecraft**: 1.8.x
* рҹ”Ң **Platform**: Spigot / Paper / Bukkit
* рҹ’ҫ **RAM usage**: ~2вҖ“5 MB (very lightweight!)

---

## рҹ’» Commands & Permissions

### Commands

| Command          | Description               | Aliases         |
| ---------------- | ------------------------- | --------------- |
| `/decay`         | Open main settings menu   | `/dw`, `/dwool` |
| `/decay menu`    | Open main menu            | -               |
| `/decay reload`  | Reload configuration      | -               |
| `/decay toggle`  | Enable/disable system     | -               |
| `/decay stats`   | Open statistics menu      | -               |
| `/decay cleanup` | Clear all decaying blocks | -               |

### Permissions

```yaml
decayingwool.*              # All permissions
  в””в”Җ decayingwool.admin     # Full access to commands & GUI
  в””в”Җ decayingwool.bypass    # PlayerвҖҷs wool does NOT decay*
```

**вҡ пёҸ Note:**
`bypass` only works for **non-OP** players. OP players always follow decay rules.

---

## вҡҷпёҸ Configuration

### config.yml

The plugin auto-generates config files, but **GUI editing is recommended**!

```yaml
# Main settings
plugin:
  enabled: true
  debug: false

# Decay settings
decay:
  enabled: true
  phase1-duration: 5
  phase2-duration: 5
  phase3-duration: 3
  
  world-mode: "whitelist"
  enabled-worlds:
    - world_bedwars
    - bw_arena1
  
  effects:
    particles:
      enabled: true
      type: "SMOKE_NORMAL"
      amount: 5
    sound:
      enabled: true
      phase-change: "BLOCK_WOOL_BREAK"
      disappear: "BLOCK_WOOL_BREAK"
      volume: 0.5
      pitch: 1.0
  
  drops:
    drop-items: false
    drop-on-break: true

# Performance
performance:
  max-blocks-per-tick: 50
  cleanup-interval: 200
  async-processing: true
```

---

## рҹҺҜ Server-Oriented Features

### вҡЎ Performance Optimizations

* **Asynchronous processing** вҖ” no TPS drops
* **Blocks-per-tick cap** вҖ” prevents lag
* **Auto cleanup** of inactive blocks
* **Low memory usage** (2вҖ“5 MB)
* **Thread-safe** operations

### рҹ”’ Safety

* **Permission checks**
* **Config validation**
* **No duplication exploits**
* **Compatible with other plugins**

### рҹҢҗ Compatibility

Tested with:

* BedWars1058
* BedWarsProxy
* Multiverse-Core
* WorldGuard
* GriefPrevention
* EssentialsX

---

## рҹ“Ҡ Technical Details

### Architecture

```
DecayingWool
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Managers
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ DecayManager
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ GUIManager
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ WorldManager
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ ConfigManager
в”ңв”Җв”Җ GUI Menus
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ MainMenu
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ PhaseSettingsMenu
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ WorldManagement
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ EffectsMenu
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ StatisticsMenu
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Listeners
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ BlockPlace
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ BlockBreak
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ InventoryClick
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ ChunkListener
в””в”Җв”Җ Models
    в””в”Җв”Җ DecayingBlock
```

### Data Handling

* **ConcurrentHashMap** for safe async access
* **Periodic cleanup**
* **Chunk unload handling**

---

## рҹҺ® Usage Tips

### For admins

1. Start with default settings (5/5/3)
2. Test on an arena
3. Get player feedback
4. Adjust for your server style
5. Use statistics menu

### For players

* рҹҹ§ **Colored wool** вҖ” just placed
* в¬ң **Gray wool** вҖ” decaying soon
* в¬ӣ **Black wool** вҖ” final warning
* рҹ’Ё **Gone** вҖ” place more

### Recommended settings

**Fast-paced (solo):** 2 / 2 / 1 (5 sec)
**Standard (2вҖ“4 players):** 5 / 5 / 3 (13 sec)
**Slow mode:** 10 / 10 / 5 (25 sec)

---

## рҹҗӣ Known limitations

* Only works with **wool** (`Material.WOOL` in 1.8.8)
* More blocks can be added via `affected-wool`
* Timers reset on server restart (normal behavior)

---
